nasb.text: Because of the sins of her prophets And the iniquities of her priests, Who have shed in her midst The blood of the righteous;

esv.text: This was for the sins of her prophets and the iniquities of her priests, who shed in the midst of her the blood of the righteous.

cnv.text: 因為錫安先知的罪惡，和祭司的罪孽， 就是他們在城中流了義人的血，

ccb.text: 这都是因为她的先知和祭司的罪行。 他们在城中杀害义人。
